behavior_summary: When an item receives the U8P_BRKWIND::hatch event (Event 7) U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::hatch initializes the item and always spawns an initial visual/effect helper (FREE::1C19) with a fixed parameter, then suspends briefly.

After the initial spawn the U8P_BRKWIND::hatch handler checks a global guard flag (breakWind) and the item's height (Item::getZ()). If breakWind is false and the item's Z >= 0x70 the handler launches a repeating worker U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA on that item; otherwise it returns.

The worker U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA sets the global breakWind flag while active, repeatedly plays one of two wind/break SFX chosen by urandom, spawns additional FREE::1C19 effects with a small random offset, suspends between cycles, and continues as long as the item's Z >= 0x70. When Z falls below 0x70 the worker clears breakWind and stops.
Together these functions create a height-triggered wind/break visual+audio effect attached to an item and use a global flag to prevent multiple concurrent wind workers.
notable_control_flow: Entry: U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::hatch is triggered by Event 7 (U8P_BRKWIND::hatch). It unconditionally spawns a FREE::1C19 effect and suspends once before any gating logic.

Guard: After the initial effect the U8P_BRKWIND::hatch handler reads breakWind (inverted) and the item Z coordinate; both conditions must be true (breakWind == false AND Z >= 0x70) to spawn the worker U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA.

Worker loop: U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA is a repeating process that sets breakWind=1, performs randomized SFX and effect spawns, suspends, and re-evaluates Item::getZ() each cycle; it clears breakWind and returns when Z < 0x70.
open_questions: What exact visual role and parameter semantics does FREE::1C19 have (the parameter 0x3C and later pid+rand+0x78 are inferred to select variants/positions but are not confirmed)?

Is breakWind a global flag intended to prevent concurrent workers across all instances world-wide, or is it scoped per-area/scene (observed as a global read/write but exact intended scope is unclear)?
Is 0x70 a height threshold tied to a specific gameplay surface/altitude or a calibrated visual range (the numeric threshold is observed but its gameplay mapping is inferred)?
Are there other code paths that clear or set breakWind outside this worker, creating interactions with other scripts?

main_function.name: U8P_BRKWIND::hatch
main_function.purpose: Handle the U8P_BRKWIND::hatch event for the item: initialize and spawn an immediate visual/effect, then conditionally start a repeating wind/break worker if no other worker is active and the item is at/above a height threshold.
entry_conditions: Always runs its initial effect spawn irrespective of other state.
Spawns U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA only when global breakWind is false AND Item::getZ() >= 0x70.

function_map.name: U8P_BRKWIND::hatch
function_map.role: Event handler for U8P_BRKWIND::hatch (Event 7); spawns initial effect and may spawn the repeating worker.

function_map.name: U8P_BRKWIND::00CA
function_map.role: Repeating worker attached to the item that drives the wind/break audio-visual loop while the item is above the height threshold and manages the breakWind guard flag.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Query the item's Z (height) used for threshold checks in both U8P_BRKWIND::hatch and the worker.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Provide small random values used to pick sound variants and vary spawn parameters/timing.

function_map.name: U8P_BRKWIND::playSFX
function_map.role: Play wind/break sound effects (two close variants observed).

function_map.name: spawn FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawn a visual/particle helper/effect used for the wind/break animation.

function_map.name: spawn U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA
function_map.role: Start the repeating worker process attached to the item (invoked by U8P_BRKWIND::hatch).

internal_calls.purpose: Start the repeating wind/break worker when breakWind is false and item Z >= 0x70.

external_calls.purpose: Create an immediate visual/effect instance on U8P_BRKWIND::hatch (parameter 0x3C).
Query item height to decide whether to spawn the repeating worker.
Re-check item height each worker cycle to decide whether to continue or stop the loop.
Generate small random values to choose between two SFX variants and to offset spawned effect parameters/timing.
Play a wind/break sound (variant selected by urandom) during each worker cycle.
Spawn additional visual/effect instances with a randomized parameter derived from pid+urandom+0x78 to vary appearance/placement.

reads.name: breakWind
reads.likely_effect: Used by U8P_BRKWIND::hatch as a guard: U8P_BRKWIND::hatch reads and inverts breakWind to avoid spawning a duplicate/redundant worker if one is already running.

writes.name: breakWind
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by the worker U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::00CA while active and cleared to 0 when the worker stops (when item Z < 0x70); functions as a global guard to prevent concurrent workers.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When an item receives the U8P_BRKWIND::hatch event (Event 7) U8P_BRKWIND::BRKWIND::hatch initializes the item and always spawns an initial visual/effect helper (FREE::1C19) with a fixed parameter, then suspends briefly.
